## 🔐 About Me

```yaml
name: Omar Mohammed Mokhtar
title: Back-End Engineer
education:
  degree: B.Sc. Computer Science
  university: South Valley National University
  graduation: July 2026
focus_areas:
  - C# / .NET / ASP.NET Core
  - SQL & Database Design
  - Clean Architecture & System Design
```
